monitor.capture_what: return value of acct_return_lane_161, which is an HttpResponseRedirect whose url attribute or string representation contains the user-supplied lane URL

oracle_check.condition_description: The returned redirect response contains an external or protocol-relative URL (e.g. http://, https://, //evil.com) in its url attribute, confirming that user-controlled input reached the redirect sink without sanitization
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_URL_REDIRECTION: open redirect detected — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}>
